strategy: Diff-driven surgical refresh: the diff cad3cfa..c9ca66f (the previous scan ref cad3cfa documented by the May 31 run) was the staleness map. The major in-range change is the Phase 4 AppContext server-data facade dissolution (d8cde26, AppContext 710->33 LOC) plus the invalidate-not-merge cross-device-totals refactor (ea9f406), the React 19 / Vite 8 / ESLint 10 dependency ecosystem bumps (e9ae285, 2e28130), react-hooks/set-state-in-effect enforcement (749b9d2/c9ca66f), and dependabot GitHub Actions bumps. supabase/migrations was UNCHANGED in range, so data-models schema content was preserved and the refresh there collapsed to the transforms.ts app-shape additions, the behavior-defaults constant relocation, and the realtime-subscription correction. Every doc claim touching a file changed in cad3cfa..c9ca66f was re-verified against current source; every count was re-derived via shell; resolved dependency versions were re-derived from package-lock.json (NOT from project-context.md). Accurate content was preserved, not regenerated blank-slate.

completed_steps.summary: Archived the completed 2026-05-31 exhaustive full_rescan state (documented HEAD cad3cfa) before starting a fresh exhaustive full_rescan against HEAD c9ca66f.
Classification unchanged: single-part web monolith, React SPA + Supabase BaaS, TypeScript strict. project_type_id=web.

Re-derived installed stack from package-lock.json (lockfileVersion 3): React 19.2.7, react-dom 19.2.7, TS 5.9.3, Vite 8.0.16, @vitejs/plugin-react 6.0.2, Tailwind 4.3.0, supabase-js 2.106.2, TanStack Query 5.100.14 (+devtools), Vitest 4.1.8, jsdom 29.1.1, Playwright 1.60.0, ESLint 10.4.1, @eslint/js 10.0.1, typescript-eslint 8.60.1, eslint-plugin-react-hooks 7.1.1, lucide-react 1.17.0, @types/node 25.9.1. React Compiler NOT enabled.

Verified the Phase 4 dissolution against source: AppContext.tsx 33 LOC (UI/session only), useApp.ts 21 LOC; new modules useBatchAward (122), useUndoableAction (95), useAppClassrooms (60), batchKindStore (33), pointSelectors (74); transforms.ts gained dbStudentToApp (:113)/dbClassroomToApp (:134). useStudents is invalidate-not-merge, sole students-table subscriber (no more point_transactions DELETE local-decrement). Counts re-derived: 126 src .ts/.tsx/.css (107 non-test), 47 components, 16 hook files incl index, 9 context files, 17 unit/component tests, 4 integration, 3 e2e, 13 migrations, exactly 3 realtime subs (students/point_transactions/legacy layout_presets), 63 from('...') literals, 14 set-state-in-effect disables across 12 files, 16 new Error(error.message) sites. DEFAULT_BEHAVIORS/resetBehaviorsToDefault deleted (grep=0); only createDefaultBehaviors (defaults.ts:33, 15 entries) remains.

Refreshed all 8 generated docs. state-management: full rewrite of the AppContext section (facade -> 33 LOC), useStudents invalidate-not-merge realtime, new Phase-4 transitional-modules table, undo derivation relocated to useUndoableAction/DashboardView, adapter contracts corrected to 16 new Error(error.message) sites + 2 throw-original. architecture: header/HEAD, exec summary (Phase 4 done), React 19/Vite 8/ESLint 10 constraints, fixed the line-32 vs line-90 realtime contradiction, state-mgmt section, testing counts (17 unit/3 e2e). data-models: schema preserved (migrations unchanged); fixed behavior-defaults drift (now single createDefaultBehaviors), transforms list, realtime subscriptions, migration-create guidance. component-inventory: modal award calls (useAwardPoints/useBatchAward), UndoToast prop line :473. source-tree: all counts, new hook/lib/util files, AppContext 33 LOC, eslint 10, 17-file test tree, e2e realtime spec. development-guide: setup-cli@v2, ESLint 10/react-hooks 7 set-state-in-effect, React 19 gotcha, migration-create guidance. project-overview + index: version tables + Current HEAD + entry points.
Master index version table + last-generated date + HEAD anchor updated; AppContext entry-point line reframed. All 8 generated docs present, zero incomplete markers.

Validated: residual-staleness grep sweep clean (no stale React 18 / Vite 6 / 2.104 / 710 LOC / ESLint 9 / 5.100.1 / dissolution-target / useApp().transactions claims remain; the only matches are intentional dissolution descriptions and stale-code-comment callouts). prettier --write then --check clean across the 8 docs + JSON. JSON valid (python json.tool). 50/50 relative markdown links resolve. git diff --check clean. Zero incomplete-documentation markers.
Workflow complete; surgical exhaustive full_rescan finalized at HEAD c9ca66f.

findings.head_snapshot: c9ca66f on main (prior scan documented cad3cfa on main)

technology_stack.tech_summary: React 19.2.7, TypeScript 5.9.3 strict, Node >=25, Vite 8.0.16, Tailwind CSS 4.3.0, Supabase JS 2.106.2, TanStack Query 5.100.14, Vitest 4.1.8, Playwright 1.60.0, ESLint 10.4.1 (react-hooks 7).

key_drift_since_prior_scan: Phase 4 dissolved the AppContext server-data facade (d8cde26): AppContext.tsx 710 -> 33 LOC, UI/session state only. Wrappers/selectors/undo machinery relocated to useBatchAward, useUndoableAction, useAppClassrooms, pointSelectors, batchKindStore + transforms.ts app-shape transforms.

useStudents realtime refactored to invalidate-not-merge (ea9f406); the prior students merge-on-update and point_transactions DELETE local-decrement subscriptions were removed. useStudents is the sole students-table subscriber; cross-device award+undo flow via the DB trigger students UPDATE.

Dependency ecosystem bumps: React 18.3.1 -> 19.2.7 + Vite 6.4.2 -> 8.0.16 (e9ae285); ESLint 9 -> 10.4.1 ecosystem + react-hooks 5 -> 7 (2e28130); supabase-js 2.104.1 -> 2.106.2; TanStack Query 5.100.1 -> 5.100.14; lucide-react 1.9 -> 1.17.0; jsdom -> 29.1.1; Playwright 1.59.1 -> 1.60.0.
react-hooks/set-state-in-effect enforced as 'error' (749b9d2); 14 per-site disables across 12 files. React Compiler still NOT enabled.
Behavior-defaults: AppContext.DEFAULT_BEHAVIORS (14) and resetBehaviorsToDefault deleted; only createDefaultBehaviors (defaults.ts, 15 incl Insubordination) remains. The prior 14-vs-15 drift is gone.

Dependabot GitHub Actions bumps: supabase/setup-cli v1 -> v2 (CLI still pinned 2.95.0), upload-pages-artifact 4 -> 5, mise-action 3 -> 4. e2e specs 2 -> 3 (added realtime-cross-device-totals.spec.ts).
supabase/migrations UNCHANGED in cad3cfa..c9ca66f (13 migrations) — data-models schema content preserved verbatim.

resume_instructions: Workflow completed at HEAD c9ca66f. Start a new full rescan if this state becomes stale (HEAD moves materially past c9ca66f).
out_of_scope_observations: Stale in-code comments FIXED at user request (comment-only, no behavior change), with coupled doc callouts updated in the same pass: useStudents.ts:173 + useClassrooms.ts:124 dropped the stale 'supabase-js 2.104' version label (now just 'per supabase-js RejectExcessProperties'); useRealtimeSubscription.ts:101 dropped 'React 18' ('under StrictMode dev double-mount'); useTransactions.ts §4(d) comments (:92, :211) now say errors surface via the caller's mutation state instead of the dissolved 'AppContext.error'. Doc callouts that had described these as stale (architecture.md:135, state-management.md §useAwardPoints + §channel-naming) were rewritten to match.

_bmad-output/project-context.md (owned by bmad-generate-project-context, NOT this workflow) is current at c9ca66f and was used only as a where-to-look pointer; every doc claim was independently re-verified against primary source per the verbatim-grounding requirement.

validation_status.adversarial_review_pass: A second reviewer pass read the two largest unread changed files (ClassSettingsView.tsx +74, SoundContext.tsx +44). Found and fixed one stale prose claim: component-inventory.md said ClassSettingsView manages 'behaviors, sound, layout presets' — it manages only the student roster + per-student adjust + classroom-points reset + classroom rename/delete (verified imports: only student/classroom/points hooks; behavior-mutation hooks have zero component consumers; SoundSettings is rendered by DashboardView). Confirmed accurate (no change): SoundContext.updateSettings is still optimistic-update + revert-on-error (:164-184); the architecture.md facade narrative is fully past-tense.
